/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -pthread -g "CMakeFiles/mini-redis.dir/src/Command.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mini-redis.dir/src/Connection.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mini-redis.dir/src/EventLoop.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mini-redis.dir/src/RespCodec.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mini-redis.dir/src/Store.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mini-redis.dir/src/TcpServer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mini-redis.dir/src/main.cpp.o" -o mini-redis  -lpthread
